name: Toca v. Louisiana
question:
1. Does the rule in Miller apply retroactively to juveniles sentenced to life in prison without the possibility of parole?

2. Does the Supreme Court have jurisdiction where a state court has failed to find a Teague exception?
description: A case in which the Court was to consider whether the rule in Miller applies retroactively to juveniles sentenced to life in prison without the possibility of parole, but was dismissed prior to arguments.
